text: Drink {sip} if you're wearing socks right now.
Anyone who's ordered a takeaway alone this week — drink {sip} and respect yourself.
Everyone drinks {sip} for every notification on their phone right now.
{player1} gives out {large} — distribute however you want among the group.
If you've sent a voice note in the last week, drink {sip}.
Drink {small} if you've ever gotten drunk alone.
Give out {large} if you've ever left the continent you were born on.
Drink {sip} if you've ever gone horseback riding.
Drink {sip} if you sleep like a baby after sex.
If you've ever changed your hair colour — {take_or_give_small}.
Anyone with cigarettes on them — drink {sip} per cigarette, up to 8.
{player1}: take {sip} and give out {max}.
{player1}: give out {sip} for every person in the group.
Take {small} if you've ever had a tactical vomit on a night out.
Take {sip} if you've never smoked weed.
Take {small} if you've ever gone with friends to get tested for STDs.
The player who most recently cracked open a beer gives out {small}.
If the clock shows an odd number of minutes, everyone takes {medium}. If not, {player1} gives out {large}.
{player1} and {player2}: compare your drinks. The player with the fullest glass takes {sip}.
If you are smoking or vaping right now — {take_or_give_medium}.
If you arrived late today — {take_or_give_small}.
Give out one {sip} for each item of white clothing you're wearing right now.
Drink {sip} if you've ever been to a music festival.
Drink {small} if you've ever pretended to be sober when you weren't.
Drink {sip} if you've ever pretended to know a song lyric when you didn't.
Drink {sip} if you've ever been kicked out of a bar or club.
Everyone who has ever cried in public drinks {sip}.
Everyone who has a pet, take {sip}!
Anyone who's been on a date in the last month — drink {sip}!
Everyone who's cried at a film this year, drink {sip}.
Everyone who's checked their phone in the last 5 minutes, drink {sip}.
If you've ever ghosted someone — take {small}.
Last person to text their ex — take {small} and own it.
If you have a tattoo — {take_or_give_small}.
If you've ever told someone you were 'on your way' while still in bed — drink {sip}.
People in relationships, give {small} to another player.
The player with the most recent birthday, give out {small}.
Everyone with the letter 'O' in their first name, drink {sip}.
Players who use Twitter/X, drink {sip}.
Anyone with a coin in their pocket can give {sip} to anyone who doesn't.
{player1}: give out one {sip} for every uncle you have.
{player1}: give out as many {sip} as you have siblings.
If you have pierced ears — {take_or_give_small}.
If you have curly hair — {take_or_give_small}.
If you have green eyes — {take_or_give_small}.
If you wear glasses — {take_or_give_small}.
People with iPhones — {take_or_give_small}.
Youngest player in the group — {take_or_give_small}.
Oldest player in the group — {take_or_give_small}.
If your legs aren't shaved right now — {take_or_give_small}.
If you've ever donated blood — {take_or_give_small}.
If you're a {topic} — {take_or_give_small}.
If you've ever squished a bug on purpose — {take_or_give_small}.
Anyone who has lived in 3 or more towns or cities — {take_or_give_small}.
Take {sip} if you got your driver's licence on your first try. Take {small} if you ever failed it. Take {medium} if you still don't have one.
If you have more than 3 one night stands under your belt — raise your glass and say "To casual sex!" then {take_or_give_small}.
If you've ever taken a dump at a nightclub — {take_or_give_small}.

If you've ever been on the news — {take_or_give_large}.
If you've ever slept with someone and then forgot their name — {take_or_give_small}.
If you've ever slept with someone whose native language wasn't English — {take_or_give_small}.
If you and another player in this group have ever slept with the same person — both take {medium}.
If you didn't bring food or drink to this party — take {medium}.
Hold the glasses of the two players either side of you and feed them {sip} each.
Who wants to volunteer to take {large}? If no one steps up in 5 seconds, everyone takes {small}.
{player1}: take {sip} then give out {large} however you want.
The person whose phone battery is lowest right now takes {medium}.
Anyone with more than 10 tabs open on their phone right now drinks {sip}.
Drink {sip} if your lock screen is a photo containing yourself.
The person with the most unread messages right now takes {medium}.
If you've ever fallen asleep in a Uber — {take_or_give_small}.
If your most used emoji is not 😂 or ❤️ — {take_or_give_small} and explain yourself.
{player1}: any player who doesn't follow you on Instagram takes {sip}.
First person to pull a condom out of their bag or pocket gives out {large}.
If you have slept with 2 different people on the same day — {take_or_give_small}.
Take {sip} if you've never smoked weed.
Drink {small} if you've ever had sex on public transport.
Drink {small} if you've ever hooked up with someone you met through a dating app.
Drink {small} if you've ever measured yourself or a partner. You know what we mean.
Drink {small} if you've ever had multiple situationships at the same time.
GAME — {topic}. Go around naming one each. Repeat or blank = drink {sip}. {player1}, you start.
